AutocompletePlus_TagSource_IconPosition.name: Tag category icon position
AutocompletePlus_TagSource_IconPosition.tooltip: Show a category-specific icon for each suggestion. Hover the icon to see its category.

AutocompletePlus_TagSource_PrimaryTagSou.name: Primary source for 'all' Source
AutocompletePlus_TagSource_PrimaryTagSou.tooltip: When 'Autocomplete Tag Source' is 'all', this determines which source's tags appear first in suggestions.

AutocompletePlus_TagSource.name: Autocomplete Tag Source
AutocompletePlus_TagSource.tooltip: Select the tag source for autocomplete suggestions. 'all' includes tags from all loaded sources.

AutocompletePlus_Autocompletion_UseFastS.name: Use Fast Search
AutocompletePlus_Autocompletion_UseFastS.tooltip: Use indexed search for immediate results. Large tag sources use it automatically to avoid blocking the interface.

AutocompletePlus_Integration_LoRAManager.name: LoRA Manager integration
AutocompletePlus_Integration_LoRAManager.tooltip: Use LoRA Manager's local tag, LoRA, Embedding, and Wildcard APIs as supplemental autocomplete sources.

AutocompletePlus_Integration_ExcludedNod.name: Excluded node types
AutocompletePlus_Integration_ExcludedNod.tooltip: Comma-separated node type names whose text inputs must be left to another extension.

AutocompletePlus_Autocompletion_PrefixAr.name: String to add before artist tags
AutocompletePlus_Autocompletion_PrefixAr.tooltip:
Text to prepend when inserting an artist tag via autocomplete.
e.g. '{'@'}' -> '{'@'}artist_name'.

AutocompletePlus_Autocompletion_ReplaceU.name: Replace '_' with 'Space'
AutocompletePlus_Autocompletion_ReplaceU.tooltip: This setting also affects related tags display.

AutocompletePlus_Autocompletion_AutoInse.name: Auto-Insert Comma
AutocompletePlus_Autocompletion_AutoInse.tooltip: Automatically insert a comma after tags when inserting from autocomplete.

AutocompletePlus_Autocompletion_MaximumR.name: Maximum autocomplete results
AutocompletePlus_Autocompletion_MaximumR.tooltip: Safety limit for the complete in-memory result snapshot. Only visible rows are rendered.

AutocompletePlus_RelatedTags_RelatedTags.name: Related Tags Trigger Mode
AutocompletePlus_RelatedTags_RelatedTags.tooltip: Which action will trigger displaying related tags for the entered tag (click only, Ctrl+click).

AutocompletePlus_RelatedTags_MaximumResu.name: Maximum co-occurrence results
AutocompletePlus_RelatedTags_MaximumResu.tooltip: Safety limit for the complete in-memory co-occurrence snapshot. Only visible rows are rendered.

AutocompletePlus_Display_HideAlias.name: Hide Alias
AutocompletePlus_Display_HideAlias.tooltip: Hide alias column in the autocomplete and related tags display.

AutocompletePlus_AutoFormatter_Trigger.name: Auto Format Trigger
AutocompletePlus_AutoFormatter_Trigger.tooltip:
Auto: Format automatically when leaving text field.
Manual: Format only via keyboard shortcut. default keybind: (Alt+Shift+F)

AutocompletePlus_AutoFormatter_UseTraili.name: Use Trailing Comma
AutocompletePlus_AutoFormatter_UseTraili.tooltip:
When enabled, ensures all lines end with a trailing comma.
When disabled, removes trailing commas.

AutocompletePlus_AutoFormatter_TrimSurro.name: Trim Surrounding Spaces
AutocompletePlus_AutoFormatter_TrimSurro.tooltip: When enabled, trim any blank lines from the beginning and end of the prompt.
